strategy: Hit with Death (+40% incoming); avoid Life (40% resist).
He heals the group for 750 (Rebirth) whenever Tired Fighter takes damage. Kill the Lazy Henchman early to stop the heals.
He is only 1115 health, so one solid attack removes him. Focus him down first.
Then clean up the rest with AoE.
cheatNotes: He Rebirth-heals 750 (no absorbs) whenever Tired Fighter is damaged, undoing your progress. Kill him early to shut it off.
His own side's spells do not trigger the heal, only your attacks on Tired Fighter.
It also fires when Half-Witted Skeleton casts Blizzard or Tired Fighter casts Tempest.
